title: carthamus carduncellus
intro: Carthamus carduncellus, also known as the esculenta silybum or cardoon thistle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and laxative effects. The health benefits of Carthamus carduncellus include its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and support the liver and kidneys. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in some culinary dishes for its edible leaves and stems.
